N_PZ1A_OBC_UDS_VC_20200608

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DADEF1
Recv ID: 18DAF1DE
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: DE
Func Name: BCB-OBC_29b
